title: Add native_sim UDP/CoAP post-injection observer
description: Review follow-up from project-LICHEN-kxbj: the native_sim L2 packet-path gate proves LICHEN_L2 TX -> LoRa loopback -> RX -> net_recv_data injection with exact IPv6/ICMPv6 bytes, but intentionally does not prove post-IP UDP/CoAP application delivery. Add a higher-layer native_sim observer using UDP/CoAP or sockets once the stack path can send without bypassing route/ND constraints, and assert the app-level payload is accepted after net_recv_data.
